# OpenDCL Model Catalog (8877 models)

# Browse: grep "^##" model-catalog.md
# Format: slug | dims | tris | size | category/sub | description [tags] [anim: clips] | curl | thumb: url
# Download into assets/Models/ then reference with GltfContainer.create(entity, { src: 'assets/Models/{slug}.glb' })
# Fetch the thumbnail URL to preview the model before importing
